stages.name: targeted_unit_tests
stages.evidence: safety_mode_matrix_test covers the canonical mode order, parse, buildFlag, primaryMode, matrixModes (override -> single; config -> canonical-sorted unique), the isModeDependent classifier, sortModeResults, the additive result.mode_matrix serialization (omitted when null so single-mode reports stay byte-identical; emitted when present while preserving result.mode), config acceptance of multiple zig.modes, --mode override parsing/validation, and the Debug-vs-ReleaseFast fixture; run_command_test adds a mode-matrix integration test (Debug killed / ReleaseFast survived recorded in mode_matrix with result.mode preserved and isModeDependent true), a single-mode null-matrix test, and a --mode single-mode override test; config_test flips its pre-058 guardrail to assert multiple modes are now accepted; full suite green

stages.name: property_tests
stages.evidence: The custom Result.jsonStringify omits mode_matrix when null, so every pre-058 single-mode report snapshot (report_schema, report_renderers, dogfood, doctest, run_command) is byte-identical; mode_matrix rows are always sorted by canonical mode order so matrix output is deterministic regardless of config order or execution order

stages.name: cli_smoke
stages.evidence: run --mode Turbo is rejected with ZNTL_CLI_INVALID_OPTION naming the four valid modes; --mode <valid> is accepted as a single-mode override

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: self-mutation dogfood is gated to the Phase 7 stages (task 085); the mode-matrix model, classifier, and additive report extension are deterministic and covered by unit + integration tests

residual_risk: task-definition correction: test/config_test.zig guards the pre-058 single-mode restriction (its test is named '... before task 058') but was omitted from task 058's allowed_files. Lifting the restriction (a task acceptance criterion) requires flipping that test, so test/config_test.zig and the task markdown were added to task 058's allowed_files (queue.json + the markdown, kept in sync) to bring the in-flight fix in scope -- a substance-over-ceremony correction of the allowed_files omission, not a scope expansion into unrelated files.

Mode-matrix execution runs each additional mode serially per mutant after the primary parallel pass; this is deterministic but not parallelized across modes (matrix population is opt-in via multiple configured modes and is bounded by mutant count x mode count).

The Debug-vs-ReleaseFast safety-mode effect is exercised via an injected mode-aware mock in run_command_test; real compiler overflow-check behavior across optimize modes is documented by the test/fixtures/safety_modes/overflow.zig fixture and validated end to end by the Phase 7 dogfood stages.
